data.name: 【刪減內容】：SexCP-069
data.detailed_description:
遊戲概述

平靜表象下的現代都市，一個未知存在悄然甦醒。
你將扮演誕生自深層慾望的異常，潛藏於人群之中，在城市的角落蔓延滋長。

你要收集目標角色的資訊，並使用特殊能力，讓她們成為真實的自我、沉溺其中——你將不再受任何限制。

遊戲特色

  • 探索系統
    城市被迷霧籠罩，需透過感知一點一滴揭露地圖，挖掘角色心聲。

  • 目標鎖定與解析
    透過角色的內心與日常行動掌握其破綻，鎖定最佳行動時機。

  • 能力運用與控制進程
    每位角色有各自弱點，使用恰當的方式逐步瓦解其戒心，讓她們接受真正的自己。

  • 風險管理
    若太過激進導致地區警戒升高，將可能觸發███介入，影響你後續行動。

角色介紹

  • 主要角色

羽奈｜偶像

「只要我笑著，大家就不會發現我快撐不下去了。」

現役人氣偶像，表面光鮮亮麗，實則內心崩潰、渴望依賴他人又充滿控制欲。她的防線，一旦崩潰將徹底失控。

佐佐木晴香｜人妻

「這個家、這份責任……我真的甘願嗎？」

溫柔賢淑的家庭主婦，安穩的心卻藏著難以言說的空虛。她渴望被理解，卻不敢跨出一步。

小桃｜超商店員

「我才沒那麼容易就動心，欸嘿♥」

每天打兩份工的活力女孩，表面毫無防備，卻對「特別的視線」十分敏感。

  • 次要角色

林綾｜研究員

「……你，到底是什麼？」

天才研究員，對各種異常都有著極大興趣。對怪異來說最危險的存在。

九十九真淵｜日風酒吧老闆娘

  • 來自芥川組的情慾系VTuber 九十九真淵 飾

「你這雙眼睛…十分有趣。」

沉靜、神秘的成熟女性，掌握著各種人脈與情報，微醺的夜是她最為放鬆的時光，也是最好攻陷的瞬間。

雪之下織雪｜香氛按摩師

  • 來自芥川組的情慾系VTuber 雪之下織雪 飾

「想知道你的壓力從哪來嗎？」

用香氣與觸感引導情緒的專家，實則精神狀態不穩，是容易被干涉的高風險對象。

一切都還只是開始。

data.short_description: 《【刪減內容】：SexCP-069》是一款養成調教遊戲。你必須感知她們的內心想法、蒐集隱藏的情報，並鎖定合適的目標。憑藉你的特殊能力，你將逐步瓦解她們的防線，迫使她們展現最真實的自我。
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文*, 英文, 簡體中文*, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 560 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • 儲存空間: 540 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • 儲存空間: 560 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound

data.name: 【REDACTED】：SexCP-069
data.detailed_description:
Game Overview

Beneath the calm surface of a modern metropolis, an unknown presence quietly awakens.

You will play as an anomaly born from the depths of human desire, lurking among the populace and steadily expanding your influence from the hidden corners of the city.

You must gather intel on your target characters and use your special abilities to lead them to their true selves—completely immersed, with nothing left to hold you back.

Game Features

  • Exploration System
    The city is shrouded in mist. Use your perception abilities to gradually uncover the map and uncover your targets’ inner thoughts.

  • Target Lock & Analysis
    Observe each character’s inner thoughts and daily behavior to identify their weaknesses and seize the perfect moment to act.

  • Ability Use & Control Progression
    Each character has her own weaknesses. Use the right approach to gradually break down her defenses and lead her to accept her true self.

  • Risk Management
    If you push too hard and raise the alert level of a region, it may trigger intervention by ███, hindering your future actions.

Character Introduction

  • Main Character

Hana｜Idol

「As long as I keep smiling, no one will notice I'm about to break.」

A popular idol admired by the public, but inwardly crumbling. Desperate for dependency yet obsessed with control. Once her defenses fall, she will spiral out of control.

 Sasaki Haruka｜Housewife

「This home, this responsibility… am I truly content?」

A gentle and devoted homemaker hiding an unspeakable emptiness. Longing to be understood, yet afraid to take the first step.

Momoka｜Store Clerk

「You think I fall for stuff that easily? Ehehe ♥」

A lively girl working two part-time jobs. She appears carefree but is extremely sensitive to "special attention."

  • Supporting Character

Aya Hayashi｜Researcher

「...What exactly are you?」

 A genius scientist with a deep fascination for all things abnormal. The most dangerous threat to any anomaly.

TsukumoMabuchi｜Bar Madam

  • Played by Tsukumo Mabuchi, a sensual VTuber from 「芥川組 Akutagawa」

「Your eyes... are quite intriguing.」

A calm, mysterious mature woman with wide-reaching connections. The hazy nights, when she's most relaxed, offer the perfect opportunity to breach her defenses.

YukinoshitaOriyuki｜Masseuse

  • Played by Yukinoshita Oriyuki, a sensual VTuber from 「芥川組 Akutagawa」

「Want to know where your stress comes from?」

An expert in guiding emotions through scent and touch, but mentally unstable—making her a high-risk, easily influenced target.

This is only the beginning.

data.short_description: 《【READACTED】：SexCP-069》 is a training and conditioning simulation game. Sense their thoughts, gather information, and target the right girls. Use special powers to break down defenses and reveal their true selves.
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese*, English, Simplified Chinese*, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows7/8/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 560 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • Storage: 540 MB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows7/8/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • Storage: 560 MB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound
